    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    HttpClientAgent
    HttpClientBuilder.build()
    Build and return the client.
    HttpClientAgent
    HttpClientAgent.closeAndForget()
    Close immediately (shutdown(0, TimeUnit.SECONDS).
    HttpClientAgent
    HttpClientAgent.connectAndForget(io.vertx.core.http.HttpConnectOptions options)
    Connect to a remote HTTP server with the specific options, the connection is un-pooled and the management of the connection is left to the user.
    static HttpClientAgent
    HttpClientAgent.newInstance(io.vertx.core.http.HttpClientAgent delegate)
    Creates a new instance of the HttpClientAgent.
    HttpClientAgent
    HttpClientAgent.requestAndForget()
    Create an HTTP request to send to the server with the default host and port of the client.
    HttpClientAgent

    Create an HTTP request to send to the server at the host and port.
    HttpClientAgent
    HttpClientAgent.requestAndForget(io.vertx.core.http.HttpMethod arg0, String arg1)
    Create an HTTP request to send to the server at the default host and port.
    HttpClientAgent
    HttpClientAgent.requestAndForget(io.vertx.core.http.HttpMethod arg0, String arg1, String arg2)
    Create an HTTP request to send to the server at the host and default port.
    HttpClientAgent
    HttpClientAgent.requestAndForget(io.vertx.core.http.RequestOptions arg0)
    Create an HTTP request to send to the server.
    HttpClientAgent
    HttpClientAgent.shutdownAndForget()
    Shutdown with a 30 seconds timeout (shutdown(30, TimeUnit.SECONDS)).
    HttpClientAgent

    Calls shutdown(Duration).
    HttpClientAgent
    HttpClientAgent.shutdownAndForget(Duration arg0)
    Initiate the client shutdown sequence.
    HttpClientAgent
    HttpClientAgent.updateSSLOptionsAndForget(io.vertx.core.net.ClientSSLOptions options)
    Update the client with new SSL options, the update happens if the options object is valid and different from the existing options object.
    HttpClientAgent
    HttpClientAgent.updateSSLOptionsAndForget(io.vertx.core.net.ClientSSLOptions options, boolean force)
    Update the client with new SSL options, the update happens if the options object is valid and different from the existing options object.
